title: Assistant Store Manager - Om Book Shop Capital India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Om Book Shop Capital India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Om Book Shop Capital India in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Om Book Shop Capital India:
Om Book Shop Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop Capital India!
